octopus-rice-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Octopus Rice In The Oven

ingredients.item: Take to the medium heat a pot with water and let it boil.
Then add 1 coarsely chopped onion, 2 leaves of laurel and octopus. let cook for about 40 minutes, or until the octopus becomes soft (check the cooking with a fork).

instructions: Cut the octopus to pieces. Reserve.

Peel and pinch the onion; clean and cut the pepper into pieces. Praise the onion in a pot with olive oil, add the rice, wrap and refresh with white wine. Add the undone tomatoes and then the pepper and stir.
Adicione o caldo do polvo, tempere com sal e pimenta, tape e deixe cozer por cerca de 15 minutos, em lume brando. Acrescente depois o vinagre e envolva.
Transfer the rice to a tray, have on top the octopus pieces and put it in the oven, preheated at 170oC, for 8 minutes. Serve sprinkled with chopped coriander.

og-zuppa-toscana-soup.name: og' Zuppa Toscana Soup
instructions: Combine sausage and red pepper flakes in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir until sausage is brown and crumbly, 7 to 10 minutes. Drain excess fat; transfer sausage to a bowl and set aside.
Cook onion, bacon, and garlic in the same skillet over medium-low heat until bacon is crisp and onions are soft, 10 to 15 minutes. Set aside.
Combine water and chicken bouillon in a large pot; bring to a boil. Stir in potatoes; cook until soft, about 15 minutes.
Pour in cream; simmer until heated through, about 2 minutes. Add sausage, onion mixture, and kale; cook and stir until flavors combine, about 10 minutes.

okonomiyaki-brussels-sprouts.name: Okonomiyaki Brussels Sprouts
instructions: Arrange oven racks in top and lower thirds of oven. Place one rimmed baking sheet on top rack and another on bottom rack; preheat to 450°. Toss brussels sprouts and oil in a large bowl; season with salt. Carefully remove one hot pan from oven and transfer half of sprouts to pan—they’ll sizzle! Working quickly, turn sprouts cut sides down (don't worry if you can't get to all of them; it doesn't have to be perfect!). Repeat with second pan and remaining sprouts. Roast brussels sprouts, rotating pans halfway through, until cut sides are seared and tops are browned, 15–20 minutes.

Meanwhile, mix Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, honey, vinegar, ginger, and ½ tsp. shichimi togarashi in a small pot. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat, then reduce heat to medium-low and gently simmer, stirring frequently, until thickened and glazy, 3–4 minutes. Taste and season with salt.

Pour glaze over brussels sprouts and toss to coat. Transfer to a platter. Sprinkle with nori, then squeeze mayonnaise over in stripes, covering the whole dish (trust us!). Pile bonito flakes in the center of the sprouts. Top with sesame seeds, scallions, and a dusting of togarashi.

old-fashioned-raisin-pie.name: Old Fashioned Raisin Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Combine raisins and water in a small saucepan. Boil 5 minutes.
Mix brown sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, and salt together; add to hot raisins. Cook and stir until syrup is clear. Remove from heat; stir in vinegar and butter. Cool slightly.
Turn filling into a pastry-lined pie dish. Cover with top crust. Seal edges and cut slits in the top crust.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 to 35 minutes.

old-school-tiramisu.name: Old-school Tiramisu
instructions: Lightly oil a 9x5" loaf pan and line with plastic wrap, leaving plenty of overhang. Whisk coffee, rum, salt, and 1 Tbsp. sugar in a shallow dish until sugar and salt dissolve. Chill until ready to use.
Whisk cream and mascarpone in a medium bowl just until smooth. Set aside.

Pour water into a large saucepan to come 2" up the sides and bring to a simmer. Combine egg yolks, remaining ⅓ cup sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water in a medium heatproof bowl. Set bowl over pan and reduce heat to low so water is at a bare simmer. Using an electric mixer (or a large whisk and a friend to fill in when your arm cramps), beat mixture on medium-high until eggs triple in volume and are extremely pale yellow and mixture forms a slowly dissolving ribbon when drizzled over itself in bowl, 5–7 minutes. Remove bowl from heat.
Using clean beaters (or whisk), beat reserved cream mixture until medium peaks form. Add egg yolk mixture and gently fold until no streaks remain.

Working one at a time, dip ladyfingers into chilled coffee mixture and let soak just long enough for them to soften, 1–2 seconds per side. Lay 8 cookies in prepared pan (it’s okay to smush them in a bit). Spread one-third of filling over. Layer another 8 soaked ladyfingers on top and spread half of remaining filling over. Repeat layers one more time with remaining ladyfingers and filling. Cover pan with plastic wrap; chill tiramisu until firm, at least 6 hours and up to 12 hours (longer is better; you’ll get cleaner slices and the layers will be fully set).

Invert a small platter or a large plate over top of loaf pan, hold together tightly, and flip them over so plate is underneath. Set on a work surface and carefully remove pan. Peel away plastic wrap from tiramisu; discard. Generously dust tiramisu with cocoa powder. Serve in slices, dusting with more cocoa powder if desired.
Do Ahead: Tiramisu (without cocoa powder) can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

olive-oil-and-honey-pudding-teleculinari.name: Olive Oil And Honey Pudding
instructions: Put the sugar in a processor and crush it. Add the honey, olive oil, eggs and lemon zest and grind again.
Pour the previous preparation in a form (about 22 cm in diameter) previously greased with butter. Take it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, in a sea bath, for 45 minutes.
Remove the pudding from the oven and let it cool. Deform carefully and lead to cold until served.

ingredients.item: 1 cup of black or green olive oil (literacceptions)
1/2 cup white cheese or lor cheese Home
1 egg white (heat & liquid; for will be expected)

olives-with-bacon-almonds-and-dried-toma.name: Olives With Bacon, Almonds And Dried Tomatoes
olives-with-bacon-almonds-and-dried-toma.original_name: Olives with rusty, almonds and dried tomato

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of almond (can be waited in hot water and peeled in the shells)

2. Wooded horizontally.
3. Wrap the olives with rusticing and wrapped with curing.
4. Olive oil and wealth with lemon slices, butter and juice.

onion-frittata.name: Onion Frittata
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Whisk first 7 ingredients in a medium bowl; set aside. Heat oil in a medium ovenproof nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion; sauté until soft, about 6 minutes. Reduce heat to low. Stir in egg mixture. Spoon dollops of ricotta evenly over.
Cook until frittata begins to set, about 2 minutes. Place in oven; bake until just set, 7-9 minutes. Slide the frittata onto a platter. Cut into wedges; serve hot or at room temperature.

onion-liver-traditional-recipe-pequerece.name: Onion Liver (traditional Recipe)
instructions: We cut the onion into juicy. Let's have a good jet of extra virgin olive oil till we cover the base of the saucepan. We add the onion and put them onto medium heat to get them to stew. We cut our garlic teeth, and once the onion is doradite, we add our garlic teeth so that they get stew as well. Once we're all clear and clear.
In a bowl we put flour and pepper, mix well and reserve. We cut every filet of liver by half or three pieces, add some salt and tighten slightly
We fry our steaks into an abundant extra virgin olive oil, back and forth, and we leave our steaks on paper.

We added the steaks to the casserole where we have baked onion and garlic, we turn around and cook for a few minutes. Then we put our pineapples, we turn around and finally our wine, we let them reduce the salsa a little and the liver will be ready.

onion-meat-relish.name: Onion Meat Relish
instructions: In a medium saucepan over medium heat, slowly cook and stir the onions and butter until onions are tender, approximately 10 minutes.

Mix red wine vinegar, salt, ground black pepper and white sugar with the onions and butter. Continue to cook and stir until the mixture thickens to a chunky, spreadable consistency, about 10 minutes. Refrigerate until serving.

orange-cake-recipe-with-almonds-comedera.name: Orange Cake Recipe With Almonds
orange-cake-recipe-with-almonds-comedera.original_name: Receta de bizcocho de naranja con almendras fácil
instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 ° C. Fold a round mold of 22-24 cm and, if you want to secure a clean crumbling, put paper at the base.

Wash the orange well. Cut into pieces, remove seeds and tighten with skin included. A thick dough with small fragments should be left, not an entirely liquid purée. That texture helps make the biscuit more aromatic.
Beat the eggs with the sugar till the mixture loses its grain and becomes more pale. No need to ride them, just integrate enough air so that the miga doesn't get heavy.
Incorporates oil and mixture without excessive beating. Add the crushed and remove orange till the dough takes a uniform color.
Meg flour, ground almond, baking powder and salt. The almond brings moisture and natural fat, so it well balances the final texture.
Add the dyes into two pits and blend with softness. The mass should be dense but smooth. If you notice that it's too thick according to the size of the orange, titrate with 1-2 tablespoons of milk.
Fold the mixture into the mold and clear the surface. He puts some whole almonds above them and they don't just decorate, they also get tipped and they bring contrast.
Hornea 45 to 50 minutes. The biscuit is at its point as the surface purifies and small fissures form and a stick comes out with moist crumbs but with no raw mass.
Let them rest ten minutes before they get them. Fitted with a grid and sprinkle with sugars just at the end so that it doesn't get smoked earlier.

orange-cheesecake-teleculinaria.name: Orange Cheesecake
instructions: Crush the cookies in a chipper, lie in a bowl, add the melted butter, mix well and then line a removable background shape with this prepared, pressing with a spoon.

Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water. In a bowl, beat the cream cheese with sugar, then add the yogurts and beat again. Drain and melt the leaves of gelatin in a sea bath or in the microwave, without boiling, and incorporate them into the cream, in yarn and always beating.
In a separate bowl, whip the cream into whipped cream and wrap it in the mix as well. Remove the scraping and juice from the oranges and also wrap them in the cream, saving some scraping for the end.
Deite o creme na forma, sobre a bolacha, alise e leve ao frio ate solidificar. Retire, desenforme com cuidado e decore com a raspa de laranja que reservou.

orange-rice-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Orange Rice Pudding
instructions: Lay the water on a pot, add the butter, the pinch of salt, the orange shard and the cinnamon stick, take it to the fire and let it boil. Add the rice and let it boil, stirring from time to time, until you run out of water.
Then add the warm milk, slowly and stirring from time to time, letting the rice cook until it becomes soft and creamy. Add the sugar, stir and let it boil for another 5 minutes.
In a bowl, beat the yolks, add some rice, stirring until it gets warm. Then join the pot, always stirring.
Remove from the fire, reject the cinnamon stick, lie in a bowl and let it cool. When serving, sprinkle with cinnamon powder.

oven-baked-swordfish-teleculinaria.name: Oven Baked Swordfish
instructions: Fix the swordfish posts, put them on a tray and season them with lemon juice, 0.5 dl of the olive oil, salt and pepper. Let it marinate for 20 minutes.

Then take it to the preheated oven at 180 Peel and wash the onion and garlic teeth, pinch them finely, lay them in a bowl, add some chopped parsley, the sweet pepper, the rest olive oil and vinegar, season with salt and pepper and mix very well.

Water the swordfish with the previous preparation and put it back in the oven for another 10 minutes or until it gets very hot. Remove from the oven and serve with cooked vegetables, for example potatoes and broccoli.

oven-dried-strawberries.name: Oven-dried Strawberries
instructions: Toss strawberries and sugar in a large bowl and let sit until berries start to release their juices, 25–30 minutes.

Preheat oven to 185° (or the lowest possible setting, which may be 200°). Spread out berries on a rimmed baking sheet lined with a nonstick baking mat and bake, rotating baking sheet about every 30 minutes, until berries are darkened in color and dried out around the edges but still slightly juicy in the center, 3–3½ hours. Let cool on baking sheet.
Do Ahead: Berries can be dried 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

oven-roasted-corn-on-the-cob-with-blue-c.name: Oven-roasted Corn On The Cob With Blue Cheese
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine butter and dill in a small bowl to form a paste; rub on each ear of corn. Wrap each ear individually in aluminum foil; arrange on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Transfer baking sheet to a heat-proof surface; carefully open each packet. Sprinkle corn with blue cheese.
Bake corn in the preheated oven until cheese is melted, about 5 minutes.
